CustomObject.description: Opportunity Intelligence (Program 2) staging + human-review queue. One row per normalized public opportunity posting (grain = solicitation, NOT a company). Populated read-only from public sources (Grants.gov first). Human-review-gated: nothing flows to a CRM Opportunity, Lead, or outreach without a reviewer. No secrets stored. Dormant by default.
CustomObject.label: OA Opportunity Signal
